title: Petoskey Farmers Market
description: Weekly indoor farmers market featuring local produce, baked goods, maple syrup, and artisan crafts from Northern Michigan growers and makers.

title: Gaslight District Gallery Walk
description: Free self-guided art walk through downtown Petoskey galleries and shops. Enjoy wine, hors d'oeuvres, and meet local artists as you stroll the Gaslight District.

title: Petoskey Winter Festival
description: Annual celebration of winter in Northern Michigan with ice sculptures, a chili cook-off, horse-drawn carriage rides, and family activities along the waterfront at Pennsylvania Park.

title: Live Music at City Park Grill
description: Live acoustic performance by regional musicians at the historic City Park Grill. Enjoy dinner and drinks while listening to a mix of folk, blues, and Americana.

title: Vault 432: Fallout-Themed Dinner at City Park Grill
description: An immersive five-course post-apocalyptic dining experience inspired by the Fallout video game and TV series. The menu features creative dishes like Gator Claw Skewer, Braised Deathclaw Brisket, and Sugar Bomb Brownie. Costumes encouraged but optional. Reservations required by calling 231-347-0101.

title: Little Waves: Children's Music Program
description: Free interactive music session for children ages 3-10 presented by the Great Lakes Chamber Orchestra. Kids hear live musicians demonstrate their instruments, enjoy a musical story, and participate in fun music-related activities. No registration required.

title: Project Connect 2026
description: A day of service at North Central Michigan College connecting individuals in need with health and human services from around 50 local non-profit agencies and businesses. Free and open to the community.
